mapper.select: SELECT BELONG_IDX, HOMEPAGE_ID, BELONG_NAME, GROUP_NAME, ZIP_CODE, ADDRESS, USE_YN, MANAGER_NAME, MANAGER_PHONE, ADD_ID, MOD_ID FROM TRAINING_BELONG WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND BELONG_IDX = #{belong_idx}
mapper.update: UPDATE TRAINING_BELONG SET BELONG_NAME = #{belong_name}, GROUP_NAME = #{group_name}, ZIP_CODE = #{zip_code}, ADDRESS = #{address}, USE_YN = #{use_yn}, MANAGER_NAME = #{manager_name}, MANAGER_PHONE = #{manager_phone}, MOD_DATE = SYSDATE, MOD_ID = #{mod_id} WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND BELONG_IDX = #{belong_idx}
